homepage.heroSubline: Brick Tech Contracting: Unwavering quality and lasting craftsmanship across New York. Delivering robust masonry solutions for over a decade.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Bricklaying Excellence in NYC
aboutText: Brick Tech Contracting Corp. started with a simple goal: to provide enduring masonry work that stands the test of time. Founded by seasoned masons who honed their skills in the demanding New York construction scene, we understood the need for reliability and resilience in every project. From brownstone restorations to modern brickwork, our commitment has always been to quality craftsmanship.

Our approach is built on a foundation of honesty, integrity, and open communication. We believe in partnering with our clients, understanding their vision, and delivering results that exceed expectations. We use only the finest materials and employ proven techniques to ensure every project is structurally sound and aesthetically pleasing.

We're not just building structures; we're building relationships and strengthening our community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and sustainable practices. Brick Tech Contracting is invested in the future of New York.

services.name: Brick Repair & Restoration
services.shortDescription: Preserving New York's architectural heritage through expert brick repair and restoration.
services.description: Brick Tech Contracting specializes in restoring and repairing brickwork across New York. From historic brownstones showing their age to modern brick facades damaged by weather, we offer comprehensive repair solutions. Our services include brick matching, mortar repair (repointing), brick replacement, and structural stabilization. We understand the importance of preserving the original character of buildings while ensuring their structural integrity. We carefully assess the damage, identify the underlying causes, and develop a tailored plan to restore the brickwork to its former glory. We use traditional techniques and modern materials to ensure a durable and aesthetically pleasing result. We address issues like spalling, cracking, water damage, and efflorescence, preventing further deterioration and extending the life of your brick structures. We work with all types of brick, including common brick, face brick, and glazed brick. We also provide cleaning and sealing services to protect your brickwork from future damage.
process: Step 1: Thorough Inspection: We assess the damage and identify the underlying causes.
Step 2: Material Matching: We source or create matching bricks and mortar for seamless repairs.
Step 3: Expert Repair: Our skilled masons carefully repair or replace damaged brickwork.
Step 4: Protective Sealing: We apply sealants to prevent future water damage and deterioration.

faq.question: How do you match the existing brick?
faq.answer: We meticulously analyze the color, texture, and size of the existing brick and source matching materials from local suppliers or create custom blends to ensure a seamless repair.

faq.question: What is repointing?
faq.answer: Repointing is the process of removing and replacing damaged or deteriorated mortar joints. It is essential for maintaining the structural integrity and preventing water damage to brickwork.

faq.question: How long will the repairs last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance and sealing, our brick repairs can last for many years, protecting your building from further deterioration.

services.name: Stone Masonry
services.shortDescription: Crafting durable and beautiful stone structures that enhance your property's value.
services.description: Brick Tech Contracting provides expert stone masonry services for residential and commercial properties in New York. We work with a variety of natural stone materials, including granite, limestone, sandstone, and slate, to create stunning and durable structures. Our stone masonry services include stone veneer installation, retaining walls, walkways, patios, and custom stone features. We understand the unique properties of each type of stone and use appropriate techniques to ensure a long-lasting and aesthetically pleasing result. We work closely with our clients to design and build stone structures that complement their property's style and enhance its overall value. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise cuts, proper alignment, and secure bonding. Whether you're looking to add a touch of elegance to your home or create a durable and functional outdoor space, Brick Tech Contracting has the expertise to deliver exceptional stone masonry services. We are familiar with local stone quarries and suppliers, ensuring access to high-quality materials at competitive prices.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation: We discuss your vision and create a custom stone masonry design.
Step 2: Material Selection: We help you choose the perfect stone for your project.
Step 3: Expert Installation: Our skilled masons meticulously install the stone with precision.
Step 4: Finishing Touches: We complete the project with proper sealing and cleaning.

faq.question: What type of stone is best for a retaining wall?
faq.answer: Granite and limestone are excellent choices for retaining walls due to their strength, durability, and resistance to weathering. We can help you select the best stone based on your specific needs and budget.

faq.question: How do you ensure the stone is properly bonded?
faq.answer: We use specialized mortars and adhesives designed for stone masonry. We also ensure proper surface preparation and bonding techniques to create a strong and long-lasting connection.

faq.question: How do I maintain my stone masonry?
faq.answer: Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and water is typically sufficient. We can also apply protective sealants to prevent staining and water damage.

services.name: Concrete Block (CMU)
services.shortDescription: Providing durable and cost-effective concrete block solutions for various construction needs.
services.description: Brick Tech Contracting offers comprehensive concrete block (CMU) services for commercial and residential projects in New York. CMU is a versatile and cost-effective building material used for foundations, walls, and other structural elements. Our services include CMU block installation, repair, and reinforcement. We have extensive experience working with CMU in a variety of applications, including load-bearing walls, firewalls, and sound barriers. We understand the importance of proper installation techniques to ensure structural integrity and compliance with building codes. We use high-quality CMU blocks and mortars to create durable and long-lasting structures. We also provide CMU block sealing and waterproofing services to protect against moisture damage and extend the life of the structure. Our skilled masons are proficient in laying CMU blocks with precision and efficiency, ensuring a smooth and level surface. We work closely with contractors and architects to ensure that the CMU block construction meets all project requirements.
process: Step 1: Site Preparation: We prepare the site by leveling the ground and laying a solid foundation.
Step 2: Block Laying: Our skilled masons carefully lay the CMU blocks with precise alignment.
Step 3: Mortar Application: We apply high-quality mortar to create strong and durable joints.
Step 4: Reinforcement: We reinforce the CMU structure with steel bars for added strength.

faq.question: What are the advantages of using CMU blocks?
faq.answer: CMU blocks are cost-effective, durable, fire-resistant, and provide excellent thermal insulation. They are also relatively easy to install, making them a popular choice for various construction projects.

faq.question: How do you ensure the CMU structure is strong enough?
faq.answer: We follow strict building codes and use appropriate reinforcement techniques to ensure the CMU structure can withstand the required loads. We also conduct thorough inspections to verify the structural integrity.

faq.question: Can CMU blocks be used for exterior walls?
faq.answer: Yes, CMU blocks can be used for exterior walls. However, they typically require a protective coating or cladding to prevent moisture damage and enhance their appearance.

services.name: Chimney Repair & Rebuild
services.shortDescription: Ensuring safe and efficient chimney operation through expert repair and rebuild services.
services.description: Brick Tech Contracting provides comprehensive chimney repair and rebuild services for New York homeowners. Chimneys are exposed to harsh weather conditions and require regular maintenance to ensure safe and efficient operation. Our services include chimney inspection, cleaning, repair, and rebuild. We address common chimney problems such as cracked or spalling brick, damaged mortar joints, and deteriorated flue liners. We use specialized tools and techniques to safely and effectively repair or rebuild chimneys. We also provide chimney waterproofing services to prevent water damage and extend the life of the chimney. Our skilled masons are experienced in working with all types of chimney materials, including brick, stone, and concrete. We understand the importance of proper chimney construction and repair to prevent fire hazards and carbon monoxide poisoning. We work closely with homeowners to assess their chimney needs and provide tailored solutions that meet their budget and safety requirements. We are licensed and insured, ensuring that all our chimney work is performed to the highest standards.
process: Step 1: Chimney Inspection: We conduct a thorough inspection to identify any damage or safety hazards.
Step 2: Repair or Rebuild: We perform necessary repairs or rebuild the chimney to ensure safe operation.
Step 3: Flue Liner Installation: We install or repair the flue liner to prevent carbon monoxide leaks.
Step 4: Waterproofing: We apply waterproofing sealant to protect the chimney from water damage.

faq.question: How often should I have my chimney inspected?
faq.answer: It is recommended to have your chimney inspected at least once a year to identify any potential problems and ensure safe operation.

faq.question: What are the signs of a damaged chimney?
faq.answer: Signs of a damaged chimney include cracked or spalling brick, damaged mortar joints, water leaks, and a deteriorated flue liner.

faq.question: What is a flue liner?
faq.answer: A flue liner is a protective barrier inside the chimney that prevents carbon monoxide leaks and protects the chimney structure from heat damage.

services.name: Foundation Repair
services.shortDescription: Stabilizing and strengthening your building's foundation with expert repair solutions.
services.description: Brick Tech Contracting offers expert foundation repair services for residential and commercial properties in New York. A solid foundation is crucial for the stability and safety of any building. Our services include foundation crack repair, wall stabilization, and waterproofing. We address common foundation problems such as settlement, shifting, and water damage. We use proven techniques and high-quality materials to ensure a long-lasting and effective repair. We carefully assess the foundation damage, identify the underlying causes, and develop a tailored plan to restore its structural integrity. We provide foundation crack injections, carbon fiber reinforcement, and wall anchoring services. We also offer foundation waterproofing to prevent water damage and protect against future problems. Our skilled masons are experienced in working with all types of foundation materials, including concrete, brick, and stone. We understand the importance of proper foundation repair and take pride in delivering exceptional results that protect your property and ensure its long-term stability.
process: Step 1: Foundation Inspection: We conduct a thorough inspection to assess the foundation damage.
Step 2: Repair Plan: We develop a tailored repair plan based on the specific foundation issues.
Step 3: Crack Repair: We inject cracks with epoxy or polyurethane to prevent water infiltration.
Step 4: Wall Stabilization: We stabilize walls with carbon fiber reinforcement or wall anchors.

faq.question: What are the signs of foundation problems?
faq.answer: Signs of foundation problems include cracks in walls or floors, sticking doors and windows, uneven floors, and bowing walls.

faq.question: How important is foundation repair?
faq.answer: Foundation repair is crucial for maintaining the structural integrity of your building. Ignoring foundation problems can lead to serious and costly damage.

faq.question: How long does foundation repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of foundation repair depends on the extent of the damage and the specific repair techniques required. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

services.name: Parapet Wall Services
services.shortDescription: Expert repair, restoration, and construction of parapet walls in New York City.
services.description: Brick Tech Contracting Corp specializes in comprehensive parapet wall services throughout New York City. Parapet walls, the extension of a building's wall above the roofline, are critical for safety, aesthetics, and preventing water damage. We handle everything from routine inspections and minor repairs to complete rebuilds, ensuring these vital structures are sound and compliant with NYC building codes. Our services include brick and mortar repair, coping stone replacement, flashing installation, and structural reinforcement. We understand the unique challenges posed by New York's climate and the age of many of its buildings, and we tailor our approach to address specific issues like water infiltration, freeze-thaw damage, and structural instability. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the longevity and performance of your parapet walls. We also provide preventative maintenance services to help avoid costly repairs down the line. Whether you own a historic brownstone or a modern high-rise, trust Brick Tech Contracting to provide reliable and effective parapet wall solutions.
process: Step 1: Detailed Inspection: Thorough assessment of the parapet wall's condition and identification of any issues.
Step 2: Customized Plan: Development of a repair or rebuild plan tailored to the specific needs of the structure.
Step 3: Expert Execution: Skilled masons carry out the necessary repairs or reconstruction with precision and care.
Step 4: Quality Assurance: Final inspection to ensure the highest standards of workmanship and compliance.

faq.question: Why are parapet walls important?
faq.answer: Parapet walls provide fire protection, prevent wind uplift, and help manage water runoff. They also contribute to the building's architectural design.

faq.question: How often should I inspect my parapet wall?
faq.answer: We recommend inspecting your parapet wall at least once a year, or after any major weather event, to identify potential problems early.

faq.question: What are common signs of parapet wall damage?
faq.answer: Common signs include cracks in the brick or mortar, water stains, loose coping stones, and vegetation growth.

From the historic brownstones of Brooklyn to the modern high-rises of Manhattan, our skilled team delivers exceptional craftsmanship and reliable solutions for all your brickwork needs. We understand the unique architectural landscape of NYC and are committed to preserving its beauty and integrity.

Whether you require brick repair, repointing, new construction, or custom design elements, Brick Tech Contracting Corp has the expertise to handle projects of any size and complexity. reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Brick Tech did an amazing job restoring the brick facade on my Brooklyn brownstone. The brick matching was perfect, and the mortar work is impeccable. They were professional, courteous, and completed the project on time and within budget. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: My chimney was leaking, and Brick Tech quickly diagnosed the problem and provided a cost-effective solution. They repaired the damaged brick and installed a new chimney cap. The service was prompt and reliable.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Brick Tech built a beautiful stone patio in my backyard. They helped me choose the right stone and created a design that perfectly complements my landscape. The craftsmanship is outstanding, and I couldn't be happier with the result.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: I had cracks in my foundation, and Brick Tech provided a comprehensive repair solution. They stabilized the foundation and waterproofed the walls. The work was done efficiently and professionally, and I now have peace of mind knowing my foundation is secure.

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: Brick Tech installed a CMU block wall in my basement to create a new storage area. The work was completed quickly and efficiently, and the wall is sturdy and well-built. I was impressed with their attention to detail and professionalism.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: Brick Tech did a fantastic job repairing our building's aging parapet wall. They were thorough, communicative, and the quality of their work is exceptional. Highly recommend them for any masonry needs!
